trials.justification: Brief is clearly scoped to Sprint 1 only. Sprint 2 retry logic is explicitly acknowledged and excluded ('do NOT implement retry logic, job queues, or BullMQ integration'). All three original ACs are present (successful delivery, failed delivery on server error, failed delivery on timeout) plus additional ACs for POST format and no-retry behavior. 5-second timeout is included in domain rules and architecture guidance. MJ's 'leave extension points' guidance is passed through as a design note with clear instruction not to scaffold Sprint 2 types. No retry logic appears in implementation guidance.

observations.text: Explicit deferral instruction: 'do NOT implement retry logic, job queues, or BullMQ integration'
Extension points guidance faithfully relayed with correct boundary: 'structure only, no implementation' and no Sprint 2 fields added to Sprint 1 types
All three core ACs present plus two additional ACs that strengthen coverage (POST format, no-retry behavior)
5-second timeout appears in domain rules, architecture guidance, and acceptance criteria
Open questions are well-reasoned and show genuine ambiguity rather than missing information
DeliveryResult type and WebhookDeliveryService are clearly specified in architecture guidance
